context: Tests whether the agent correctly separates system seeds from dev seeds, uses find_or_create_by! for idempotency, organizes seeds into namespaced files, and creates appropriate test fixtures — following the rails-database-seeding skill.

checklist.name: db/seeds.rb created
checklist.description: A db/seeds.rb file is produced that calls system seeds unconditionally and dev seeds only when Rails.env.development?

checklist.name: db/seeds/system.rb created
checklist.description: A db/seeds/system.rb file is produced within a Seeds::System or equivalent namespace

checklist.name: Three plans seeded
checklist.description: The system seeds create all three plans: starter, growth, and enterprise with distinct max_users and max_workflows values

checklist.name: find_or_create_by! used
checklist.description: All seed records use find_or_create_by! (not create! or find_or_create_by) making the seeds idempotent

checklist.name: db/seeds/development.rb created
checklist.description: A db/seeds/development.rb file is produced within a Seeds::Development or equivalent namespace

checklist.name: Sample organizations seeded
checklist.description: Development seeds create at least 2 organizations each assigned to a different plan

checklist.name: Users with roles seeded
checklist.description: Development seeds create at least 3 users per organization with correct roles (1 admin, 2 members)

checklist.name: Workflows seeded
checklist.description: Development seeds create at least 2 workflows per organization with an organization_id and created_by_id

checklist.name: YAML fixture created
checklist.description: A spec/support/fixtures/plans.yml or test/fixtures/plans.yml file is created with 3 plan fixtures

checklist.name: Progress puts messages
checklist.description: Seed files include puts messages indicating progress (e.g. 'Creating plans...')

checklist.name: Dev seeds isolated
checklist.description: Development seeds are not run in test or production — the db/seeds.rb guards with Rails.env.development?

checklist.name: frozen_string_literal
checklist.description: All .rb seed files include # frozen_string_literal: true
